Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You know, there's not much time left for us to spend like this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}In just a short while, we'll be looking back on these days with nostalgia.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 13 4 5 5}No... I'm probably just tired. It's nothing you need to worry about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Since my father passed away, I've been faced with a number of complicated issues.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}My inheritance... the future of the Kirijo Group... and the expectations of everyone involved with both...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It's possible I won't be going to college or starting a career. I may need to walk a different path.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}What does marriage mean to you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 13 4 15 5}Heh... That's a straightforward answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}However, I'm a Kirijo. I can't let my feelings tug me around when making these decisions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}An agreement between two parties—such as marriage—takes careful consideration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Marriage is a union in a social context as well... That's what differentiates it from simply dating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Yes, I shouldn't have needed to ask you about that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Compromise is something that can only occur if both sides are willing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Or are you speaking from experience?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}My parents' marriage was arranged for strategic reasons.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}But, as time passed, they slowly grew to honestly love each other.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I don't think they were unhappy with their lives... Love can take many different forms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Please, wouldn't you know if I did? We're living under the same roof.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}How do I say this? Romance... just isn't my strong suit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}If I could speak with my father one last time, I would ask him directly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I lent an ear to Mitsuru...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Looks like we ended up staying until closing time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Talking in the library... I'm not setting a very good example as student council president.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We left the library and returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
